title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on stability improvements across OpsPal's platform. Salesforce users will experience more reliable deployments with better handling of complex field configurations and multi-step workflows. HubSpot connectivity issues were resolved, ensuring automation runs smoothly without interruption.

entries.headline: Salesforce deployments better handle state and country field configurations
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when your Salesforce org uses state and country picklists, preventing deployment errors. Multi-step deployments are more reliable with improved error handling and retry logic.

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments process more reliably
